demographics.living_situation: lives with parents and several younger siblings, shares a bedroom

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My little girl hasn't slept for two nights because her head is so intensely itchy, and I keep feeling a tickling like something is moving in her hair. She's scratching the back of her head raw and I'm really worried — please help.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's suddenly got much worse over the last couple of days and she can't sleep at all — and I'm scared the other kids will catch it.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two weeks ago with just a little bit of scratching
symptom_narrative.duration: about two weeks, but much worse in the last two days
symptom_narrative.character: intense itching, and a tickling feeling like something is crawling or moving in her hair
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — she can't sleep and won't stop scratching
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over her head, but worst at the back and behind her ears
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: worse at night and when she's tired and upset
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she's scratched the back of her neck raw; no fever, no rash anywhere else on her body
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she's never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she's exhausted, irritable and miserable from two nights with barely any sleep

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an anti-dandruff shampoo I bought from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: she shares a bedroom and bedding with her younger siblings; a lot of worry about the other children in the house catching it

objective_data_offered.value: when I part her hair in the light I can see tiny greyish-white specks stuck firmly to the hairs near the scalp that don't brush or flick off, mostly behind her ears and at the back of her head
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: caregiver observation in home lighting without magnification

objective_data_offered.value: I think I can see one or two tiny things moving in her hair when I look closely
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: caregiver observation, not confirmed under magnification

objective_data_offered.value: there are scratch marks and broken, raw skin at the back of her scalp and down onto her neck
she doesn't feel hot to me and I haven't measured a fever
shared bedroom with her siblings, soft toys and shared bedding on the beds
